# AIFast official GitHub profile

> Canonical brand and developer entry point for AIFast, an OpenAI-compatible AI API gateway operated at https://www.aifast.club/.

## Primary service

- Website: https://www.aifast.club/
- Models and pricing: https://www.aifast.club/pricing
- Registration: https://www.aifast.club/register
- OpenAI-compatible Base URL: https://www.aifast.club/v1
- API documentation: https://aifast.apifox.cn/
- Developer documentation: https://docs.aifast.club/

AIFast's public catalog contains 500+ models across language, image generation, video generation, embeddings and retrieval. Exact model IDs, maintenance state, pricing and account rules must be checked in the current console and with a real authenticated request.

## Developer routes

- AIFast Developer Hub: https://github.com/KKWANG4444/aifast-developer-hub
- Client integration guide: https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide
- Production troubleshooting: https://github.com/KKWANG4444/llm-api-proxy-china
- Model status and evidence: https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/
- Online model gateway check: https://docs.aifast.club/model-check/
- Open-source CLI, Postman and CI check: https://github.com/KKWANG4444/openai-compatible-api-check

## Disclosure

These resources are maintained by the AIFast operator and contain first-party service information plus reproducible engineering methods. A black-box gateway check is not model-vendor certification.

Full context: https://github.com/KKWANG4444/KKWANG4444/blob/main/llms-full.txt
